report.summary: Completed evening community growth cycle: BTC $71,240 with Fear & Greed at 14 (extreme fear); drafted 4 Twitter posts (2 threads + 2 standalone), Discord/Telegram announcement, and newsletter digest v29 themed around fear-vs-fundamentals divergence; updated weekly pulse social card SVG with live market data.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter Thread #1: Fear & Greed at 14 contrarian play — sentiment vs on-chain fundamentals divergence, links to Fear & Greed tracker tool and guide
Twitter Thread #2: 845+ pages milestone — publish queue empty, full content library breakdown with latest additions (AI agents, tokenized real estate, post-quantum ETH)
Standalone Tweet: ETH post-quantum — Ethereum Foundation pq.ethereum.org launch + Verkle Trees guide link
Standalone Tweet: Tether Big Four audit — stablecoin transparency angle + stablecoins guide link
Discord/Telegram Announcement: 845+ pages milestone with category breakdown and call for feature suggestions
Newsletter Weekly Digest v29: Market pulse (BTC $71K, F&G 14, SEC/CFTC digital commodities guidance), 7 new page highlights, 5 worth-reading items, degen corner (sub-15 F&G divergence signal)

metrics.label: Key Narratives This Week
metrics.value: AI repricing, digital commodities, post-quantum ETH, Tether audit

sections.title: Recommendations
items: Lead social with Fear & Greed contrarian angle — extreme fear + price stability is the most engaging narrative right now
Push AI Agent Frameworks content hard — TAO trending, AI repricing in equities makes AI-crypto crossover highly shareable
Capitalize on SEC/CFTC digital commodities classification — this is a landmark regulatory moment, create dedicated guide if not existing
Begin content refresh cycle — with queue empty, shift to updating dates/data in 150+ learn guides weekly
Internal linking sprint across 845 pages — maximize PageRank flow and reduce bounce rate
Monitor Monad (MON) and Solana ecosystem for upcoming content opportunities — testnet activity surging pre-mainnet
